purpose: Freeze the approved Pilot V2 products, delegated Gateway key lifecycle, one Workspace charge, prepaid Tencent fulfillment, Runtime facts, operator workflows, announcements, and evidence levels without claiming unfinished implementation or runtime evidence.
machineBoundary: Six product surfaces including OPL Serve planned_not_in_launch, four implementation owner lanes, two customer products, ten launch stages, six delivery phases, and two guarded production verification slots.

lifecycle.removalCondition: Replace only with a newer approved launch freeze and matching contract tests.

architectureAuthority.rule: The upstream repository owns target product boundaries; this contract owns current implementation choices, exact prices, and delivery gaps.

preconditions: read-only provider capacity and price preflight
monthlySettlement.retryRule: Debit, refund, provider mutation, claim, activation, renewal, Secret write, and receipt use stable operation-scoped idempotency identities.
monthlySettlement.currentImplementation: Debit-first orchestration, confirmed-absence refund, operator review resolution, parent launch recovery after child resolution, server-computed exception-only reconciliation, and the purchase guard are code-complete and locally tested; production rollout and live reconciliation evidence remain pending.

workspaceLaunch.backgroundProgression: The existing provider reconciliation worker resumes stable compute, storage, attachment, Gateway Secret, Runtime, and receipt sub-operations after browser close or process restart.
workspaceLaunch.currentImplementation: Exact fixed-USD quote composition, required-false Workspace auto-renew intent in the stable request fingerprint, one-submit persistence, total balance preflight, tenant polling, child manual-review recovery, phase recovery, and replay tests, including fenced stale Attachment, Gateway Secret, and Runtime apply convergence, are code-complete and locally tested; deployed browser, live Sub2API, and live Tencent evidence remain pending.

providerProcurement.capacityCheck: Read-only PREPAID inventory, compatibility, quota, and price check before debit; it must not create or reserve a resource.
providerProcurement.currentImplementation: One-month PREPAID CVM/CBS requests, stable operations, and provider readback are code-complete and locally tested; live Tencent evidence remains pending.

workspaceRuntime.currentImplementation: Non-secret status, owner-user-only reveal and idempotent rotation, credential revision rollout, and redacted reset receipts are code-complete and locally tested; Runtime SSO, identity-bound Runtime requests, browser, WebSocket, and deployed rotation evidence remain pending.

gateway.keyListPaginationRule: freeze first-page total pages and requested page_size; require coherent metadata, exact page numbers and ceiling, bounded items, positive unique Key IDs, mapped user_id on every item, and collected item count equal total before cardinality selection
gateway.currentImplementation: The independent public endpoint, Session-delegated general Key create/update/delete/read/reveal, exact expiresInDays create input, authoritative expiresAt readback, per-Key Usage, and upstream account aggregate are code-complete and locally focused-tested without Key/Usage persistence; browser integration, a real model request, and production readback remain pending.

consoleFinancialProjection.currentImplementation: Tenant-safe Ledger billing history and Sub2API request Usage/Stats projections plus the strict local Console presentation are code-complete and locally tested without copied fact tables; deployed live evidence remains pending.

perRunCleanup: test Workspace Deployment, Service, and Secret
verification.purchaseRule: Purchase once only when read-only inventory proves that no reusable compliant slot exists; ambiguous or multiple candidates stop without purchase.
verification.productionSmoke: Read-only service and existing-resource checks; no monthly charge and no provider mutation.
verification.currentImplementation: Dual Provider Acceptance and one-request Basic release live-QA are code-complete and fake-tested. Neither real Acceptance nor live QA has run for the current candidate.

launchStages.business: A mapped customer signs in and sees Basic and Pro with separate compute and storage prices; the internal verification slot never appears.
launchStages.currentState: Control Plane atomic mapped-owner provisioning, strict one-to-one customer identity, Sub2API password authority, and retirement of the deployment-time local user seed are code-complete and locally tested; authenticated production runtime evidence remains pending, while self-registration and SSO are outside the Pilot.

launchStages.business: The customer sees live Sub2API balance and an exact monthly compute plus storage quote before side effects.
launchStages.currentState: Granular Wallet, Key, Usage, Usage Stats, and balance-history DTOs plus exact fixed-USD Basic/Pro Workspace quotes and local Console integration are code-complete and locally tested; live authenticated Sub2API evidence remains incomplete.

launchStages.business: After read-only preflight, the exact monthly amount is debited once with a deterministic Redeem Code before any provider write.
launchStages.currentState: One-submit durable launch, required-false auto-renew fingerprinting, total balance preflight, debit-first child operations, restart recovery, and replay are code-complete and locally tested; deployed browser and live Sub2API evidence remain pending.

launchStages.business: Fabric opens one-month PREPAID CVM and CBS only after debit.
launchStages.currentState: PREPAID CVM/CBS requests and readback are code-complete and locally tested; live Tencent evidence is pending.

launchStages.business: Entitlements activate only after all billable provider resources are identified and assigned.
launchStages.currentState: Claim, confirmed-absence refund, child manual-review resolution with parent resume or explicit terminal convergence, and server-computed read-only reconciliation with a blocking guard are code-complete and locally tested; live reconciliation evidence is pending.

launchStages.business: The customer authenticates to a ready Workspace backed by owned compute, CBS, and an account-scoped Gateway Secret.
launchStages.currentState: Attachment, account Secret, readiness, non-secret status, owner-user-only password reveal/rotation, credential rollout, and redacted reset receipts are code-complete and locally tested; Runtime SSO is outside the Pilot, while browser, WebSocket, live model, and deployed rotation evidence remain pending.
requiredDeliverables: owner-only Runtime credential reveal and rotation

launchStages.business: The owner can reveal the account's opl-workspace Key, make a metered Workspace model request, and inspect its customer-safe cost and Token facts.
launchStages.currentState: Wallet, Key list/status, request-level Usage, Usage Stats, balance history, and customer-safe integer-cost projections are code-complete and locally tested; a real model request and production readback remain pending.

launchStages.business: Customer and Tencent periods renew once with debit-first recovery, manual Tencent renewal, and provider readback.
launchStages.currentState: One Workspace-level claim, combined debit, same-ID PREPAID provider renewal/readback, expiry, refund/review, and receipt recovery are code-complete and locally tested. Enabling auto-renew and real renewal evidence remain pending.

launchStages.business: Every release proves the real Workspace and Gateway path without buying or deleting monthly Tencent resources per run.
launchStages.currentState: Dual Acceptance and one-request Basic live-QA workflows are code-complete and fake-tested; real Acceptance and live QA remain pending.
requiredDeliverables: one real dedicated-Key request per release

launchStages.business: A release is ready only from merged code, immutable Cloud and App images, runtime checks, rollback proof, and reusable verification.
launchStages.currentState: Security, immutable Ready-Pod imageID checks, grouped rollback, release tooling, local Console integration, Task 13A gates, and the deployment identity cutover are code-complete locally; immutable publication, rollout, deployed browser, Gateway, and safe real verification evidence remain incomplete.
